common.contact_us: If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to contact us.

dossier-retenu.subject: Congratulations! Your Application Has Been Accepted
dossier-retenu.title: ✅ Congratulations! Your Application Has Been Accepted
dossier-retenu.intro: We are pleased to inform you that your application for the training {{formation_intitule}} has been accepted by our educational team.
dossier-retenu.payment_deadline: You have 72 hours to complete the payment and confirm your registration.
dossier-retenu.deadline_warning: After this deadline, your spot will be automatically released for other candidates.

dossier-rejete.subject: Decision Regarding Your Application
dossier-rejete.title: ❌ Your Application Was Not Accepted
dossier-rejete.intro: Thank you for your interest in the training {{formation_intitule}}.
dossier-rejete.message: After reviewing your application, we regret to inform you that it was not accepted for this session.
dossier-rejete.encouragement: We encourage you to apply again for a future session or explore other training programs that may match your profile.

relance-paiement.subject: ⏰ Reminder: Payment Deadline Expiring Soon
relance-paiement.title: ⏰ Reminder: Your Payment Deadline Expires in {{heures_restantes}}h
relance-paiement.intro: Your application for the training {{formation_intitule}} has been accepted.
relance-paiement.consequence: Without payment before this date, your spot will be automatically released.

reversement-partenaire.subject: Commission Payout - {{montant}} FCFA
reversement-partenaire.title: 💰 Your Commission Payout
reversement-partenaire.intro: We inform you that a commission payout has been made to your account.
reversement-partenaire.info: The transfer was made according to the terms agreed in your partner contract.

reversement-apporteur.subject: Commission Payout - {{montant}} FCFA
reversement-apporteur.title: 💰 Your Commission Payout
reversement-apporteur.intro: We inform you that a commission payout has been made.
reversement-apporteur.info: The transfer was made according to the terms of your referral partner agreement.

alerte-validation-j5.subject: ⚠️ Training validation pending for 5 days
alerte-validation-j5.title: Alert: Training pending validation
alerte-validation-j5.intro: A training submitted by a partner has been awaiting validation for 5 days. Please proceed with its evaluation as soon as possible.
alerte-validation-j5.action_required: Please access the backoffice to validate or reject this training.

alerte-validation-j10.subject: 🚨 ESCALATION: Training pending for 10 days
alerte-validation-j10.title: Escalation: Validation deadline exceeded
alerte-validation-j10.escalation_notice: Administrative action required — Validation deadline exceeded by 10 days.
alerte-validation-j10.intro: A partner training remains pending validation beyond the acceptable deadline. Administrative intervention is required.
alerte-validation-j10.action_required: Please take charge of this validation or follow up with the designated responsible.

dossier-annule.subject: Cancellation of Your Application
dossier-annule.title: ❌ Your Application Has Been Cancelled
dossier-annule.intro: We inform you that your application for the training {{formation_intitule}} has been cancelled.
dossier-annule.message: This cancellation was performed for the following reason:
dossier-annule.encouragement: We encourage you to browse our catalog and apply again for a future session or explore other training programs that may match your profile.
